text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hey, what's the big deal? Look at you,<n>all
hunched over.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Something troublin' ya? Come on, lay it<n>on me!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I mean, no guarantees I'll be able to<n>solve your
problem, but...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
There's nothing worse than keepin' it<n>bottled up!
Just let it all out, and you'll<n>feel better in no time!
